events.title: Paul McCartney turns 84
events.blurb: Sir Paul McCartney, legendary co-founder of The Beatles, celebrates his 84th birthday.

angles.name: Macca's Legacy
angles.copy: Eighty-four years young and still making magic. Happy Birthday to the one and only Sir Paul McCartney!

events.title: Alison Moyet turns 65
events.blurb: English singer-songwriter Alison Moyet, known for her powerful voice and work with Yazoo, celebrates her 65th birthday.

angles.name: Voice of an Era
angles.copy: Happy 65th Birthday to the incredible Alison Moyet! Her voice defined an era and still sounds as phenomenal today.

events.title: Lionel Richie turns 77
events.blurb: American music icon Lionel Richie, known for his smooth vocals and timeless hits, celebrates his 77th birthday.

angles.name: Hello, Is It 77 You're Looking For?
angles.copy: Seventy-seven years of pure class and countless hits! Wishing a very Happy Birthday to the legendary Lionel Richie.

events.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
events.blurb: Grammy-winning American singer Cyndi Lauper, famous for her distinctive style and anthems like 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun', celebrates her 73rd birthday.

angles.name: Girls Just Want To Have Fun (At 73!)
angles.copy: Happy 73rd Birthday to the one and only Cyndi Lauper! Still rocking that unique style and those unforgettable tunes.

events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: Remembering the incredible George Michael, who would have been 63 today.

angles.name: Remembering George
angles.copy: On what would have been his 63rd birthday, we're celebrating the extraordinary life and music of George Michael. Forever missed, never forgotten.

events.title: 17 years since Michael Jackson's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 17 years since the passing of the King of Pop, Michael Jackson, who died on June 25, 2009.

angles.name: King of Pop's Legacy
angles.copy: Seventeen years ago, we lost a true icon. Remembering the unparalleled artistry and impact of Michael Jackson today.

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Sir Ringo Starr, the legendary drummer of The Beatles, celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Peace and Love at 86
angles.copy: Happy 86th Birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! Wishing him peace and love on his special day.

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist, songwriter, and astrophysicist, Sir Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God at 79
angles.copy: Still rocking the world at 79! Happy Birthday to the legendary Queen guitarist, Brian May. What's your favourite May riff?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' electrifying frontman, Sir Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Still Got The Moves at 83
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still defying gravity! Happy Birthday to the incredible Sir Mick Jagger.

events.title: 45 years since MTV launched
events.blurb: On August 1, 1981, MTV launched with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star', forever changing the music landscape.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star... Or Did It?
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched and changed everything. But did video *really* kill the radio star? We think not!

events.title: 32 years since Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe'
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, which became a cornerstone of Britpop.

angles.name: Definitely a Classic
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'. An album that truly defined a generation. What's your favourite track?

events.title: 57 years since Woodstock
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Festival, '3 Days of Peace & Music', took place from August 15-18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Remembering Woodstock
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, half a million people gathered for three days of peace and music at Woodstock. A truly iconic moment in history.

events.title: 49 years since Elvis' passing
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who died on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: Forty-nine years on, the King's legacy still reigns supreme. Remembering Elvis Presley today.

events.title: 30 years since Tupac Shakur's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since the tragic passing of influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who was shot in Las Vegas on September 7, 1996, and died on September 13, 1996.

angles.name: Remembering A Legend
angles.copy: Thirty years since we lost a voice that changed music forever. Remembering the incredible Tupac Shakur today.

events.title: 56 years since Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the passing of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who died on September 18, 1970.

angles.name: Forever Electric
angles.copy: Fifty-six years since the world lost a true guitar visionary. Remembering the unparalleled talent of Jimi Hendrix.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road' was released on September 26, 1969, featuring timeless tracks and that legendary zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: That Iconic Cover
angles.copy: Still crossing cultural boundaries 57 years on. Celebrating The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' album today!

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Rock Icon at 75
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! Still as cool and captivating as ever.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Former Oasis frontman and rock 'n' roll star Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Mad For It at 54
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that pure rock 'n' roll energy. As you were.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' (1975 UK Single)
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single in the UK on October 24, 1975, having been on the album in 1971.

angles.name: Imagine All The People
angles.copy: Fifty-one years since 'Imagine' became a UK single, its message of peace and unity resonates as strongly as ever.

events.title: 25 years since the first iPod
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising how we carry and listen to music.

angles.name: Music In Your Pocket
angles.copy: Remember life before this? Twenty-five years ago, the first iPod dropped and changed music forever. What was on your first playlist?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the release date of the very first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Grab your martini (shaken, not stirred) and your favourite Bond theme tune. Which one are you spinning first?
